name: transactions_list
description: List transactions for a specific account with optional filtering by date range, status, and type.

parameters.name: accountId
parameters.description: The account ID to retrieve transactions for

parameters.name: start
parameters.description: Start date filter in ISO 8601 format

parameters.name: end
parameters.description: End date filter in ISO 8601 format

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by transaction status (pending, sent, cancelled, failed)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of transactions to return

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of transactions to skip for pagination
